name: CatSniffer V3 (multiprotocol sniffer)
label: CatSniffer V3 — 802.15.4/Zigbee/Thread/BLE/sub-GHz passive sniffer
description: ElectronicCats/CatSniffer-Firmware — CatSniffer V3 passive multiprotocol RF sniffer (IEEE 802.15.4/Zigbee/Thread, BLE, sub-GHz) with live Wireshark (extcap) capture. Two chips: CC1352P7 radio (cc2538_bsl) + RP2040 USB bridge (uf2). Passive analysis, no attack. CC flashes the sniffer build only; the bundled airtag_spoofer (active TX) is excluded.
note: Two-chip device: CC1352P7 sniffer via cc2538_bsl (BOTH chips must be flashed for a functional sniffer). asset_match is TIGHTLY scoped to sniffer_fw_Catsniffer_v3.x.hex; exclude_regex drops the bundled airtag_spoofer (active TX), airtag_scanner, and justworks builds. License is README-declared AGPL-3.0 (copyleft) despite the API's NOASSERTION -> resolve before mirroring; prefer sourcing the Sniffle BLE build from nccgroup's clean GPL-3.0 asset instead of this hub. A real SHA256SUMS.txt ships but keep verify: until a real CatSniffer flash. RP2040 bridge .uf2 uses CC's existing uf2 backend. Third consumer of cc2538_bsl.
